# James Tannahill - Contact & Location

> Contact page and interactive map for James Tannahill, Intelligent Capital at xAI, President & Managing Partner of Plocamium Holdings, and Head of Field Operations at ProSecPR.

## contact.jamestannahill.com

A structured contact page for James Tannahill. Includes venture links (Plocamium Holdings, 1nessAgency, MonkeyThorn Meet, gOOOvy, NewYorkLab, HMU API, RDLB, ProSecPR), social profiles (LinkedIn, GitHub, X/Twitter), and a contact form via HMU API.

Contact API: https://hmuapi.com/api/u/jamestannahill

## map.jamestannahill.com

An interactive Mapbox map showing James Tannahill's location in New York City, with a tactical business card layout and MECARD QR code for contact sharing.

## About

James Tannahill - jamestannahill.com
Intelligent Capital at xAI. President, Plocamium Holdings. Head of Field Operations, ProSecPR.

## Ventures

- Plocamium Holdings (https://www.plocamium.com): Operator-led private equity, patient capital across industrial technologies and healthcare
- ProSecPR (https://prosecpr.vercel.app): Veteran-led security advisory firm. Strategic intelligence, elite personnel, advanced technology, and continuous protection across Latin America
- 1nessAgency (https://www.1nessagency.com): Digital marketing and growth systems engineered on ethics, data, and design for regulated industries
- MonkeyThorn Meet (https://meet.monkeythorn.com/meet): Privacy-first video conferencing. Zero AI processing, zero recordings.
- NewYorkLab (https://newyorklab.co): Urban intelligence platform mapping the future state of cities through data and sensor networks
- HMU API (https://hmuapi.com): Structured contact channels for people, apps, and AI agents
- RDLB (https://www.rdlb.nyc): Strategic brand architecture for investors and operators
